title: Write a mount hook that handles both authenticated and guest users
prompt: Write `lib/my_app_web/user_auth.ex` with `on_mount(:sandbox, params, session, socket)` and `on_mount({:current_user, opts}, params, session, socket)` that must coexist. The sandbox hook must run unconditionally (for both auth and guest flows) and must not halt the pipeline. The :current_user hook must query the DB for the user if `session["user_token"]` is present. Must demonstrate: (1) sandbox hook first, never halts, (2) current_user hook second, uses `{:cont, socket}` or `{:halt, socket}` based on auth requirements, (3) shared get_connect_info extraction — do not duplicate the decode_metadata call. Handle the nil metadata case (production requests without sandbox header).
tier_rationale: Full auth+sandbox hook module — must coexist without conflict.
